cover: System architecture diagram: 'Agentforce Multi-Model Routing in 2026'. Light grey background with faint grid. Dark bold header block 'Agentforce Multi-Model Routing'. Subtitle 'Route each task to gpt-5.5, claude-sonnet-4-7, gemini-3.1-pro, or local Llama 4 Scout based on cost, latency, risk, and reasoning depth'. Top-right: profile badge 'Bennie Joseph | Architect'. LAYER 1 'Agentforce 2.0 Orchestration' (pastel blue): modules 'Agent Topic', 'Custom Reasoning Step', 'Atlas Reasoning Engine v2'. LAYER 2 'Routing Policy' (pastel green): modules 'Task Classifier', 'Risk Score', 'Cost Budget', 'Latency SLA'. LAYER 3 'Model Providers' (pastel purple): modules 'OpenAI gpt-5.5', 'Anthropic claude-sonnet-4-7', 'Google gemini-3.1-pro', 'Llama 4 Scout Local'. Central node 'Model Router' with rotating arrow, dotted directional connectors to all layers. INTEGRATION LAYER (upper right): 'MuleSoft API-to-MCP' and '@salesforce/mcp'. BOTTOM PANEL 'Governance Controls': sub-modules 'Audit Log', 'PII Redaction', 'Fallback Chain' with flow arrows. Rounded rectangle containers, dotted arrowheads, micro vector icons, modern sans-serif fonts, publication-ready engineering diagram.
images: Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Agentforce Model Routing Policy'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Agentforce Model Routing Policy'. Subtitle 'Choose the model based on task_type, risk_score, latency_ms, and data_boundary'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Task Fit with routing icon', 'Risk Control with shield icon', 'Cost Ceiling with dollar gauge icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'MODEL HARDCODING' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'POLICY ROUTING' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: `const model = 'gpt-5.5'; await callModel(model, prompt);`, right column green border '// GOOD' code: `const decision = routeModel({ taskType, riskScore, latencySlaMs }); await callModel(decision.model, prompt);`. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'Policy version logged', 'Fallback chain defined', 'PII boundary enforced'. Footer bar: 'Do not hardcode model choice inside every Agentforce action'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.

Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Scaling Agentforce Multi-Model Routing'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Scaling Agentforce Multi-Model Routing'. Subtitle 'What changes at 1K, 100K, and 10M AI tasks per month'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — '1K Tasks: simple router with clipboard icon', '100K Tasks: queues and budgets with speedometer icon', '10M Tasks: AI gateway with data center icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'UNCONTROLLED SCALE' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'GOVERNED SCALE' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: `await callModel('claude-opus-4-8', fullCaseJson);`, right column green border '// GOOD' code: `await routeAndRun({ taskType: 'case_classification', payloadTokenEstimate: 650, riskScore: 25 });`. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'Provider quotas managed', 'Audit logs externalized', 'Fallbacks tested'. Footer bar: 'At 10M tasks, model routing is platform architecture, not app logic'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.
